text: AtomicAssets on WAX is pure magic. Collection → Schema → Template → Asset. Your Pixals live at template 781515 under the pixals schema. Here’s exactly how the on-chain data flows and why it feels so cheap, fast, and verifiable.
cta: Browse the pixeljourney collection on AtomicHub →

text: Hot or Not pairing is 100% on-chain verifiable. We derive the seed from the TX memo + recent block header. No oracle. No RAM. No trust assumptions. This is how we keep every round transparent and fair for the whole WAXFAMs community.
cta: See the next seed live in Hot or Not →

text: WharfKit is the modern way to build on WAX. Session Kit + Contract Kit + Account Kit. We use it in PxWallet for secure, multi-account, auto-sign flows. Say goodbye to legacy UAL and eosjs.
cta: Check the PxWallet source on GitHub →

text: Every Pixal image lives on IPFS. When you pull a random Pixal in the Content Studio, we fetch the live asset from AtomicAssets and resolve the IPFS hash. Decentralized, permanent, and owned by you.
cta: Generate a random Pixal in the Studio →

text: Staking is coming to Pixel Journey. Lock your Pixals or YEET to earn boosts in Hot or Not, exclusive drops, and governance power. All verifiable on-chain. The future is powered by holders.
